question: What are the titles of all books written by an author with a name that contains Plato?
sql: SELECT Title FROM Book JOIN Author_Book ON Book.ISBN = Author_Book.ISBN JOIN Author ON Author_Book.Author = Author.idAuthor WHERE Author.Name LIKE '%Plato%';

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求查询包含'Plato'的作者所写的书籍标题，SQL描述正确映射了目标表(Book)、列(Title)和过滤条件(Author LIKE '%Plato%')，且未包含任何额外的聚合、分组、排序或限制操作。
